response.original_title: Jasmin Jai Painting Her Toes So Cute
response.overview: Jai is about to head out to a foot fetish party, but she needs to make sure her toes are perfect first. She gets her naked feet up on the towel and spreads her toes wide. She's going to paint each one with red nail polish to make them look nice and sexy for everyone. There's no telling how many mouths her feet are going to be in, so she makes sure they're nice and soft. Her arches are always ready for action and she's going to make sure that they're ready to be licked. As soon as she's done painting her toe nails, she's going to put on her cute little socks. Now her toenails and fingernails are red and make her way to a party that she'll never be able to forget.
response.title: Jasmin Jai Painting Her Toes So Cute
